items.text: Oferuję montaż demo aktorskiego według aktualnych wymogów reżyserów oraz reżyserów obsady 🎬💪 Szczegóły w opisie!

sharedPost.text:
🎥 Montaż demo aktorskiego z konsultacją 

Potrzebujesz demo aktorskiego, które pokaże Twój talent aktorski i wszechstronność a jednocześnie będzie zgodne z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu? Chcesz dowiedzieć się jak pobierać materiały i jak tworzyć takie demo samemu w przyszłości w łatwy sposób oraz jak zwiększyć swoje szanse na konkretną role? Jeżeli tak to zapraszam do skorzystania z mojej usługi 🙂 

✅ dokładnie przejrzę Twoje aktorskie materiały, wybiorę najlepsze aktorsko sceny oraz różnorodne pod względem emocji i ról

✅ zmontuję demo zgodnie z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu uwzględniając również to, które sceny Ty uważasz za najlepsze 

✅ podczas konsultacji opowiem Ci o obecnych standardach montażu i doboru scen, dam dużo cennych rad abyś mogła / mógł w przyszłości montować demo samodzielnie 

✅ gotowe demo dostaniesz ode mnie maksymalnie w 2 dni od wysłania mi swoich materiałów

✅ przystępna cena 💵 szczegóły na priv 

Na zdjęciach załączam jedną z wiadomość od klienta po moim montażu 🔥💪 

Uwaga! Nie zajmuję się pobieraniem materiałów.

items.text:
Chcesz zostać aktorką/aktorem albo mieć więcej aktorskiej pracy ale nie wiesz co konkretnie zrobić? 🤔 Jeżeli tak oferuję: 
🎬mentoring aktorski 
🎬nagranie wizytówek w Warszawie
🎬montaż demo aktorskiego zgodnie z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów obsady 

Szczegóły w opisie i na priv :)

sharedPost.text:
Chcesz zostać aktorką/aktorem albo mieć więcej aktorskiej pracy ale nie wiesz co konkretnie zrobić? 🤔 Jeżeli tak - zapraszam na konsultacje do mnie, nagranie wizytówek i montaż demo aktorskiego! 🎬🤩 Szczegóły w opisie! 

🎥 Mentoring aktorski 

Dla kogo? 

Dla każdego kto chce pracować jako aktor/aktorka na planach zdjęciowych. Zarówno dla tych bez doświadczenia, któryórzy nie wiedzą jak zacząć i co zrobić jak i dla tych co już pierwsze kroki mają za sobą ale chcieliby mieć więcej pracy i potrzebują rady w tym zakresie 🙂 

Na czym polega? 

Spotkanie ze mną 1:1 online, trwające godzinę. Opowiesz mi jakie zlecenia aktorskie Cię interesują - czyli Twój aktorski cel i według tego dobieramy odpowiedni plan działania. Jeżeli masz materiały aktorskie - to je omówimy i powiem co warto byłoby jeszcze do nich dodać lub jak je “podrasować”. Jeżeli nie masz to dowiesz się co i jak masz zrobić żeby je mieć 🙂 Powiem o moich poleceniach agencji aktorskich, jak samodzielnie i łatwo zrobić demo, jak nagrać i co powiedzieć w wizytówkach, jak samodzielnie szukać pracy, jak się wyceniać, na co uważać. I odpowiem na wszystkie inne Twoje pytania. Po spotkaniu otrzymasz ode mnie maila z planem działania i priorytetami do wykonania + materiałami pomocniczymi dot. materiałów aktorskich. 

🎥 Coaching aktorski z wizytówki + nagranie wizytówek w studio 

Na czym polega? 

✅ Tworzę tekst do wizytówek na podstawie informacji o Twoim doświadczeniu, pasjach, zainteresowaniach, który dostajesz przed nagraniem według castingowych wytycznych, który pokaże Twoje największe atuty

✅W studio nagrań nagrywamy 3-4 wizytówki:

🎬 do filmów i seriali 
🎬 do reklam w wersji dłuższej 
🎬 do reklam w wersji krótszej 
🎬 w języku obcym 
Ewentualnie możemy dograć wizytówkę modelingową 

✅ W trakcie nagrywania zadbam o Twoje rozluźnienie, dobrą atmosferę oraz zrobimy kilka ćwiczeń które pomogą pokazać na wizytówkach Twoją energię i błysk w oku 
oraz będę czuwać nad całym procesem

✅ Wizytówki nagramy według aktualnych standardów i wymogów castingowych 

✅ Dostaniesz zmontowane wizytówki gotowe do wysłania przez WeTransfer

🎥 Demo aktorskie 

montaż demo aktorskiego + konsultacja 

Na czym polega? 

✅ otrzymasz ode mnie demo aktorskie zmontowane zgodnie z obecnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu + podczas konsultacji wspólnie dobierzemy sceny, które się w nim znajdą oraz przedstawię Ci mój pomysł na ich kolejność 

Podczas konsultacji dowiesz się również:

✅ jak pobierać materiały do demo aktorskiego 
✅ jakie są obecne wymogi i standardy wzgledem aktorskiego demo 
✅ jakie sceny wybierać i w jakiej kolejności je zmontować  
✅ jak samemu w łatwy sposób przemontować demo pod konkretny casting 

Szczegóły priv

items.title: Chcesz zostać aktorką/aktorem albo mieć więcej aktorskiej pracy ale nie wiesz co konkretnie zrobić? 🤔 Jeżeli tak oferuję:

items.text:
**Mini serial wojenny 1940 – kobieta o blond włosach -  główny archeolog Ahnenerbe**

 

**Szukamy skarnu Templariuszy z 1307 roku!**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Morskie opowieści’’** poszukuje kobiety do roli niemieckiej pani archeolog  w szukaniu historycznych artefaktów. Najlepiej jakby kandydatka miała **od 35 – 40 lat o blond włosach o szczupłej budowie ciała. **Wszystkie kwestie postaci będą mówione po niemiecku dla lepszego efektu filmu oraz kilka po francusku gdyż będzie scena kiedy archeolog tłumaczy stare dokumenty średniowieczne. Szukamy kogoś z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej. Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. **Na początku 2025** może będziemy realizować ten mini serial  oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej **‘’Ahnenerbe’’** która chce zdobyć słynny artefakt ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. **Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne**

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

** **

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

sharedPost.text:
🎬 Pomóżmy Tomkowi dokończyć najważniejszy film jego życia 🎬

Tomasz Dobski ma 29 lat i talent, którym mógłby obdzielić kilka osób ✨
Od 10. roku życia nie rozstawał się z kamerą 📷 - obraz i dźwięk były dla niego językiem, emocją, sposobem mówienia o świecie. Jako operator filmowy, montażysta i muzyk współtworzył projekty, które oglądały tysiące widzów 🎞️

Pracował przy dużych produkcjach filmowych i serialowych, takich jak Klangor, Odwilż, Listy do M czy Polowanie na ćmy, a także przy projektach realizowanych dla Netflix np. Sexify oraz marek takich jak Mercure Hotels, Sneakers Studio, Polaroid Lab czy kampaniach body positive. Jego wrażliwość wizualną mogliście zobaczyć także w teledyskach i projektach muzycznych tworzonych m.in. z hania rani, Bedoes 2115, Natalia Nykiel, xxanaxx, Immortal Onion czy Danucera  🎶🎬
🎵 Jako muzyk - perkusista zespołu Klub Abecadła i pasjonat pianina - Tomek zawsze był w ruchu, zawsze w procesie tworzenia. Kamera, dźwięk, rytm. Życie.

⏸️ Dzień, w którym wszystko się zatrzymało

📅 7 marca 2025 roku czas nagle stanął.
Podczas pracy na planie doszło do tragicznego wypadku. Tomek spadł z dachu trzypiętrowej kamienicy. Obrażenia mózgu były krytyczne 🚨

🧠 Przez cztery godziny lekarze walczyli o jego życie, przeprowadzając skomplikowaną i obarczoną ogromnym ryzykiem operację ratującą życie. Przez kolejne pięć tygodni słyszeliśmy jedno zdanie, które łamało serca:
„Stan krytyczny. Brak rokowań. Brak nadziei.”

A jednak… 🌱
Nadzieja nie umarła. Tomek zaczął wracać.

🤍 Dziś potrafi szeptem nawiązać kontakt.
✍️ Myśli logicznie.
📝 Własną ręką potrafi napisać swoje imię.

Każdy najmniejszy gest, każde spojrzenie, każde słowo to dowód na cud, który wydarzył się na naszych oczach ✨
To, co miało być niemożliwe - stało się faktem.
 
🎞️ Najważniejsza produkcja Tomka

🙏 Dziś prosimy Was o wsparcie w najważniejszym filmie Tomka - walce o powrót do zdrowia i życia.

💛 Każda wpłata to:
– kolejna godzina intensywnej rehabilitacji 🏥
– kolejny krok 🚶
– kolejne odzyskane słowo 🗣️
– kolejna scena tej historii 🎬

Pomóżmy Tomkowi dokończyć ten film.
Film o życiu. Film o powrocie. Film o nadziei. 🌟
 
🤝 Jak możesz pomóc?

🌐 Zbiórka online: https://mammoc.pl/tomasz-dobski
💳 Przelew: 16 1020 5226 0000 6602 0635 0765 Tytułem: Tomasz Dobski
📦 wystaw przedmiot i licytuj inne: Licytacje Pełne Mocy
📌 1,5% podatku: KRS 0000769935 | cel szczegółowy: Tomasz Dobski

🎥 Pomóżmy Tomkowi napisać dalszy ciąg tej historii.
Udostępnij. Wesprzyj. Bądź częścią tego filmu.

Na planie zapewniamy ciepły posiłek, a wynagrodzenie za udział wynosi 100 zł. Szukamy osób w różnym wieku ale warunek to bycie pełnoletnim!:) 

Jeśli, jesteś zainteresowana/y proszę o kontakt 😊

items.text:
CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM SHOOTING IN HERTFORDSHIRE, w/c 23rd March
Wanted: 1 actor (M, playing age 20-25), for thrilling new short film ‘Scindo’. Shooting in Hertfordshire, over various days w/c 23rd March, a student project from an award-winning Film and TV course.

SYNOPSIS: Ex-student Isaac Turner strives for perfection in his craft of acting. In his pursuit he uses drugs as a form of catharsis, and we explore the pitfalls his addiction creates in his career. We watch as Isaac deals with social isolation and observe the complexity of feeling purposeless. 

Isaac Turner (Male, 20 – 25)

- Description: Early 20’s

Isaac is a passionate actor; he believes it gives his life purpose. Coming from a background of poverty and emotional neglect, he sees no value in himself and uses each role he is cast as to escape his worthlessness and give his life some meaning. He puts his all into each role he takes on, believing that portraying these characters perfectly is his only value to the world. However, when he is pushed to play an isolated and empty man like himself, he must finally confront his own personality and faults.

- Height: 5’8 - 6’2

- Pay Category: national minimum wage, travel expenses and food will also be covered

- Approx. 30-35 hours work

Please contact sheldonkieran4@gmail.com with your showreel and availability if interested!

Thankyou!!

Robert Carridine, RIP.😭
(March 24, 1954 – February 23, 2026)

My favourite 'all night party' song, from the legendary, saucy, slapstick, American 80s college comedy movie, 'revenge of the nerds'.

We just lost co-star, Robert Carridine, RIP, who played Lewis, passing away on February 23, 2026, cause of death was ruled a suicide. He had been battling bipolar disorder for nearly two decades. 😭

 featuring an early breakout ensemble cast role for Anthony Edwards , who several years later, became the major star in 1994 season one of medical drama series ER, as Dr. Mark Greene.

Also stars a young Curtis Armstrong as Booger, who many years later played Ahmad, record producer in 'Ray', Ray Charles Biopic. 💯🎶

items.text:
ISO: Casting for Chapman MFA Short 

**Project Title:** *Take a Little Time*

**Project Type:** Student Short Film 

**Union Status:** Non-Union

**Genre:** Coming of Age/ Musical Drama

**Length:** ~10 minutes

**Producer:** Kexin Tang

**Co-Written & Directed by:** Mackenzie Baumert

**Production Type:** Independent / Student

**Shoot Location:** [Los Angeles, CA]

**Shoot Dates:** [April 3-5,2026]

**Compensation:** Copy, meals, credit

We are committed to diverse, inclusive casting. For every role, please submit qualified performers, without regard to disability, gender, race and ethnicity, age, color, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity or any other basis prohibited by law.

SYNOPSIS:  AFTER A DISAPPOINTING AUDITION IN NEW YORK, A DRIVEN YOUNG PERFORMER RETURNS HOME TO TEXAS, WHERE RECONNECTING WITH HER MUSICIAN FATHER HELPS HER REDISCOVER HER VOICE - AND REDEFINE WHAT SUCCESS REALLY MEANS.

**DEAN GAIN **

**Male | 50s | Open Ethnicity | LEAD**

Melanie’s father. A warm, charismatic local musician with an easy sense of humor and deep emotional intelligence. When his daughter comes home, Dean battles his agency as her dad, whether he should push her towards picking up a guitar again and writing music like she used to love, or if he should stay quiet and allow her to discover her own voice. 

**Singing and guitar-playing REQUIRED. Please submit all instruments played. **

**JAMES **

**Male | 50s | Open Ethnicity | SUPPORTING**

Dean’s longtime music partner and close friend. Easygoing, warm, and quietly observant. James loves Dean like a brother and thus loves Melanie, he struggles to best support Melanie as she closes off, and properly support Dean as his friend. 

**Singing and guitar-playing preferred.**

**CASTING AGENT **

**Any Gender | 30s–50s | Open Ethnicity | DAY PLAYER**

Organized and observant individual that values efficiency and helping directors find the perfect cast. Struggles to feel empathetic towards those auditioning for them. 

**DIRECTOR **

**Any Gender | 30s–50s | Open Ethnicity | BACKGROUND**

Quiet, observant, and authoritative. Limited dialogue. Has a strong sense of their creative desires, and doesn’t care much about the emotions of those that walk in the room. 
**ACCOMPANIST**

**Any Gender | 30s–60s | Open Ethnicity | BACKGROUND**

A neutral, experienced presence in the audition room.
**Keyboard skills required.**

***EXTRAS ***

***BETWEEN THE AGES OF 20-30 for an audition scene.  (FEMALE IDENTIFYING) (3-4 TOTAL)***

***AND/OR 20-60s to play in a country bar scene. (ANY GENDER) (10-15 TOTAL)***

Please submit a headshot, resumé, and acting reel (and music sample of choice if specified for role) to [ketang@chapman.edu](mailto:ketang@chapman.edu) AND [baumert@chapman.edu](mailto:baumert@chapman.edu) by 03/10/2026. Self tape requests/zoom auditions will be requested after this date. Thanks!

**Production Type:** Independent / Student

**Shoot Location:** [Los Angeles, CA]

**Shoot Dates:** [April 3-5,2026]

**Compensation:** Copy, meals, credit

We are committed to diverse, inclusive casting. For every role, please submit qualified performers, without regard to disability, gender, race and ethnicity, age, color, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity or any other basis prohibited by law.

SYNOPSIS:  AFTER A DISAPPOINTING AUDITION IN NEW YORK, A DRIVEN YOUNG PERFORMER RETURNS HOME TO TEXAS, WHERE RECONNECTING WITH HER MUSICIAN FATHER HELPS HER REDISCOVER HER VOICE - AND REDEFINE WHAT SUCCESS REALLY MEANS.

**DEAN GAIN **

**Male | 50s | Open Ethnicity | LEAD**

Melanie’s father. A warm, charismatic local musician with an easy sense of humor and deep emotional intelligence. When his daughter comes home, Dean battles his agency as her dad, whether he should push her towards picking up a guitar again and writing music like she used to love, or if he should stay quiet and allow her to discover her own voice. 

**Singing and guitar-playing REQUIRED. Please submit all instruments played. **

**JAMES **

**Male | 50s | Open Ethnicity | SUPPORTING**

Dean’s longtime music partner and close friend. Easygoing, warm, and quietly observant. James loves Dean like a brother and thus loves Melanie, he struggles to best support Melanie as she closes off, and properly support Dean as his friend. 

**Singing and guitar-playing preferred.**

**CASTING AGENT **

**Any Gender | 30s–50s | Open Ethnicity | DAY PLAYER**

Organized and observant individual that values efficiency and helping directors find the perfect cast. Struggles to feel empathetic towards those auditioning for them. 

**DIRECTOR **

**Any Gender | 30s–50s | Open Ethnicity | BACKGROUND**

Quiet, observant, and authoritative. Limited dialogue. Has a strong sense of their creative desires, and doesn’t care much about the emotions of those that walk in the room. 
**ACCOMPANIST**

**Any Gender | 30s–60s | Open Ethnicity | BACKGROUND**

A neutral, experienced presence in the audition room.
**Keyboard skills required.**

***EXTRAS ***

***BETWEEN THE AGES OF 20-30 for an audition scene.  (FEMALE IDENTIFYING) (3-4 TOTAL)***

***AND/OR 20-60s to play in a country bar scene. (ANY GENDER) (10-15 TOTAL)***

Please submit a headshot, resumé, and acting reel (and music sample of choice if specified for role) to [ketang@chapman.edu](mailto:ketang@chapman.edu) AND [baumert@chapman.edu](mailto:baumert@chapman.edu) by 03/10/2026. Self tape requests/zoom auditions will be requested after this date. Thanks!
items.title: ISO: Casting for Chapman MFA Short

sharedPost.text:
✨ CALL FOR VOLUNTEER PERFORMERS ✨

WOOM is back to work in association with the Adelaide Hunter Hoodless Homestead, and is seeking volunteer performers for Summer Milk, an evocative pre-recorded audio walk experience.

🌾 About the Project
Summer Milk invites audiences to step outside of time and journey through the Homestead alongside Jane Hamilton Hunter, reliving intimate memories of motherhood and the extraordinary woven into everyday life. This is not a linear biography, but a walk through memory — tender, reflective, and deeply human.

🎭 Performer Role
Performers will collaboratively devise physical scores of movement, gesture, and action (not dance) to embody these memories under the direction of Holly B Wood.

📍 Details

Rehearsals: Once weekly at the Homestead in St. George

Performances: May 16–17, 2026

Auditions: Saturday, March 7, 2026 | 11 AM–4 PM

Location: Adelaide Hunter Hoodless Homestead
359 Blue Lake Rd, St. George, ON

🔗 Book your audition:
https://calendar.app.google/B5cMjJQrXKhXeQz87

Can’t attend in person? Virtual auditions are available.
📧 Contact Stage Manager Jasmine Romany with questions or to book virtually: j.romany@hotmail.com

Come help us bring memory to life. 💫

#WOOMcollaborative #SummerMilk #CallForPerformers #KWArts #SiteSpecificPerformance AudioWalk VolunteerPerformers

items.text:
🎭 AUDITION I OSLO – ER DU MELLOM 14–20 ÅR?

Momentum Company søker skuespillere og dansere til forestillingen Dymphna – en sterk og aktuell danse- og teaterproduksjon med fokus på mental helse.

Vi ser etter deg som ønsker å stå på scenen og være en del av en meningsfull produksjon sammen med et dedikert kunstnerisk team.

✨ Hvem kan søke?
• Skuespillere og/eller dansere
• Spillealder 14–20 år

📍 Audition:
Onsdag 25. mars i Oslo
(Tidspunkt og eksakt adresse sendes til de som blir invitert.)

🎬 Om forestillingen
Dymphna utforsker temaer rundt mental helse og fortelles gjennom en kombinasjon av dans, monologer og fysisk scenearbeid.
Vi søker:
• 1 kvinnelig hovedrolle
• 2 mannlige hovedroller
• Ensemble (dansere og skuespillere)

Dette er en uhonorert produksjon, men gir verdifull sceneerfaring og tett samarbeid med et profesjonelt og engasjert kunstnerisk team.

🎨 Kunstnerisk team:
*  Theo Sundby – Koreograf & regissør
* Oda Øverjordet– Produsent & regissør
* Marius Mjelve Kristiansen – Produsent & regissør

Alle som melder seg på vil få svar, uansett utfall.

👉 Interessert? Meld deg på via linken under!
Del gjerne med noen som du synes burde søke!

items.text:
🚨 **MODEL CALL: Food & Beverage Lifestyle COLLAB | MARCH 1ST (Burbank)** 🚨

🕟 Evening Session: 4:30 PM – 5:30 PM

📍 Location: Burbank, CA

We’re casting **male models** for a Food & Beverage lifestyle collaboration happening this Sunday, March 1st.

This is an **unpaid collaboration**, and we want to be clear about that upfront. Our community is centered around intentionally creating opportunities that help talent build strong portfolios, gain on-set experience, and connect with real creatives — including producers and crew already attached to upcoming projects.

Think of this shoot as an **introduction into what’s possible** when you’re working within a creative community that actively supports and develops its talent. 

✨ We are casting two distinct roles (first come, first serve):

1️⃣ **Outdoor Worker Type**

Think high-visibility vest, work boots, carpenter pants or utility-style wear.

Second and third looks should be cozy, comfortable basics (hoodie, knit, simple tee) for indoor lifestyle transitions.

2️⃣ **Biker / Heavy Commuter Type**

Think moto or commuter vibe — leather or denim jacket, helmet or gloves as props.

Additional looks should be relaxed, cozy wear (sweatshirt and a different color basic tee for variation).

If you’re interested and available:

• Comment which type you can realistically come dressed as

• Be ready to complete our application once we message you

• Serious inquiries only — we’re moving quickly

This is first come, first serve.

sharedPost.text:
What's Mark Stinger's acting background?

Mark Stinger is a musician and actor from New Jersey. His acting credits include films like ¹ ²:
- Film:
    - Rocky Balboa: He played a role in this film, showcasing his versatility as an actor.
    - Creed 1 and 2: Mark Stinger was part of the cast in both films, further solidifying his acting career.
    - Silver Linings Playbook: He acted in this critically acclaimed film, demonstrating his range.
    - Glass: Mark Stinger was part of the cast, contributing to the film's success.
    - Law Abiding Citizen: He played a role in this thriller film.
    - 21 Bridges: Mark Stinger acted in this action-drama film.
    - The Nomads: He was part of the cast in this film.
    - The Lovely Bones: Mark Stinger had a role in this film.
    - The Happening: He acted in this film directed by M. Night Shyamalan.
    - Charlotte's Web: Mark Stinger played a role in this film.
    - Invincible: He was part of the cast.
    - Limitless: Mark Stinger acted in this science fiction thriller film.
    - The Answer Man: He had a role in this film.
    - Dispatches from Elsewhere: Mark Stinger acted in this TV series.
    - Servant: He played a role in this TV series, working with M. Night Shyamalan again.
- Other work: Mark Stinger has also been involved in the Blues Brothers tribute tour, showcasing his musical talents ¹ ³.

Casting male dancer for featured role:
Casting for a featured dancer role in upcoming Bollywood movie. (Filming in the UK) 

Artist must be of Indian or Pakistani descent, must have a British passport. 

Must be Between 13 and 15-year-old or have a look that suits this age group. 

Production dates: May - June. Artist will be needed for multiple dates across this period. This will be disclosed later directly between the production company and artist. 

Shoot location Birmingham; All accommodation, Travel, meals etc will be  provided by production, during the filming schedule. 

Must be strong dancer with the ability to act realistically and contidently.

Artist must speak fluent English, speaking Hindi is bonus but not a requirement for this character.

Previous camera experience is not required but is a bonus so please mention this when submitting.

Apply today via email with Showreel,

Photos and CV

SAHANAENTERTAINMENT@OUTLOOK.COM

Please do jot apply via messages as these will not be scene.

[URGENT CASTING CALL]
Hi I’m filming a short film for my final project for Liverpool John Moores University and our male lead has unfortunately dropped out last minute. We need a male actor aged 18-25 who would be able to commute to Liverpool. We were hoping to film next week but we can work around you as long as it’s filmed by the end of March. The role is unpaid but all travel and food expenses would be covered.

If interested please contact me at lsammcph@ljmu.ac.uk

thankyouu:))

items.text:
CASTING CALL FOR VIRTUAL REALITY SHORT FILM!
THE SOUND OF ONE EYE CLOSING

PAID OPPORTUNITY - OPEN TO NON-UNION AND UNION ACTORS

SHOOT DATES: Late April 2026. 

Cory: Lead. Mid to late twenties, white, lesbian, she/her. Forced to deal with her strong need for internal control following a heartbreak. Emotionally intense and depressive. 3 days of shooting.

Indigo: Supporting. Mid to late twenties, white or racially ambiguous, lesbian, she/her. Whimsical in a Pacific Northwest, vibram-toe-shoe and herbal tea style. Charismatic leader with strong boundaries and a hint of a need for approval from others. 3 days of shooting. 

To apply, please send your Headshot, Resume and Demo Reel to: thesoundofoneeyeclosing@gmail.com

Thank you!

items.text:
Rytmigo går digitalt! Derfor tilbyder jeg lønnede jobs til børn der kan synge og/eller danse. Det mangler jeg:

Børn der kan synge mellem 8 - 12 år
Børn der kan danse mellem 9 - 17 år

I den forbindelse afholder jeg audition i Aalborg lørdag d. 10 Januar fra 13 - 16. Udover mig, vil der være en repræsentant fra Lille Label, som er en del af Sony. Lokationen i Aalborg sender jeg i en pm, når vi har aftalt noget endeligt. Mere info gives under audition. 

Så hvis du kender et barn der kunne tænke sig verdens fedeste fritidsjob, så send mig en mail på thomas@rytmigo.dk eller send en pb her på facebook, med lyd eller levende billeder af sang eller dans. Så aftaler vi videre derfra.  

Fremtidig indspilning af sang og video vil foregå fast i Aalborg, hovedsageligt i weekender eller ferier. Kan I ikke det, så er der ingen grund til at sende mig noget, eller melde jer til.  

Mvh
Thomas / Rytmigo

topComments.text: Mon ikke du mener en anden mdr. end Januar? 😊

items.text:
**🎬 CREW & SCHAUSPIELER GESUCHT — Psychological Horror Kurzfilm (Festivalprojekt)  **

Hallo zusammen,  

für meinen ersten eigenen Kurzfilm (ca. 15 Min.) suche ich eine kleine, engagierte Crew sowie Darsteller:innen im Raum Bayern.

Ziel ist ein atmosphärischer Festivalfilm, der mit begrenzten Mitteln hochwertig umgesetzt wird.  

📍 Drehort: Roßlach (Franken, Bayern) — außergewöhnliche Innenlocation  

📅 2–3 kompakte Drehtage (Termin flexibel)  

💰 No/Low Budget (Verpflegung + Fahrtkosten nach Absprache)  

🏆 Festival-Einreichungen 

🎬 Starkes Showreel-Material  

---

🩸 **STORY (kurz)  **

Eine Jugendliche nimmt nachts eine streunende Katze mit nach Hause.  

Am nächsten Morgen ist sie verschwunden — stattdessen befindet sich mitten im Wohnzimmer ein...  

Während Familie und Geistliche versuchen zu begreifen, was geschehen ist, wird klar:  

Etwas wurde nicht begraben — sondern festgehalten.  

Atmosphärischer Horror, stark schauspielgetrieben, Fokus auf Spannung und Bildsprache statt Effekte.

---

**🎥 BESONDERS GESUCHT: KAMERA / DoP ** 

Der Film lebt von Licht, Bewegung und Atmosphäre — keine Effekt-Show.  

• Erfahrung mit Innenraum-Lichtsetzung  

• Gefühl für Spannung statt Jumpscares  

• Eigenes Equipment von Vorteil  

• Interesse an visuell starkem Erzählen  

---

**🎬 WEITERE CREW  **

• Set-Ton  

• Licht / Gaffer  

• Produktionsassistenz  

• Maske (auch Einsteiger willkommen)  

• Motivierte Allrounder  

• Unterstützung in Postproduktion / Organisation willkommen  

---

🎭 SCHAUSPIELER:INNEN  

• Jugendliche Rolle (w / ca. 15–18)  

• Erwachsene Rollen (Mutter 50-55, Pfarrer 30-35, Imam 55-65)  

Intensive, emotional starke Szenen.

---

🧠 **WAS MIR WICHTIG IST  **

✔️ Zuverlässigkeit und Teamgeist  

✔️ Interesse an einem ernsthaft umgesetzten Indie-Projekt  

✔️ Kreativer Input ausdrücklich erwünscht  

✔️ Gerne auch Menschen, die das Projekt bis zur Festivalphase begleiten möchten  

---

Wenn du Interesse hast, schreib mir gern eine PN mit kurzer Vorstellung

Empfehlungen oder Weiterleitungen sind ebenfalls willkommen 🙏  

#CrewCall #FilmcrewGesucht #Kurzfilm #Horrorfilm  

#DoP #KameraGesucht #SchauspielerGesucht  

#IndieFilm #Festivalfilm #Filmstudenten  

#Bamberg #oberfranken

Sehr geehrte Damen und Herren:

Ich möchte gerne mitwirken als Statist/Komparse (Raum: Frankfurt & Umgebung) Ich bin 18 Jahre jung. Mit freundlichen Grüßen allerseits
items.title: KOMPARSE.DE

topComments.text:
Falls , nicht schon geschehen,  solltest du vernünftige Fotos haben mit denen du dich bei Komparse.de  oder Agenturen bewerben kannst. Diese wollen mindestens 4 Fotos, davon ein Profilfoto, ein Ganzkörperfoto, vor neutralem hellen Hintergrund. Jeweils einmal lächelnd und einmal neutraler Gesichtsausdruck. Mit deinem Facebook Profil  wirst du da kaum, eher null Chancen haben irgendwo gebucht zu werden. 
Man muss schon Aktiv werden, nicht jedem fallen die Komparsen Jobs in den Schoß! 
Auch würde ich bei Gesuchen etwas mehr schreiben,  wie nur, "Hallo ich suche Job" überspitzt ausgedrückt! 
Viel Erfolg bei der Suche! 
Gruß

items.text:
**Castingaufruf für studentischen Kurzfilm (Tübinale)**

Meine studentische Filmgruppe sucht Darsteller*innen für einen ca. 6-minütigen Kurzfilm, der im Rahmen der Tübinale entsteht. Gedreht wird in der Fildergegend nahe Stuttgart. Der genaue Drehzeitraum wird noch bekannt gegeben.

**Logline:**
Als eine junge Frau beginnt, ihre Beziehung mit einem anderen Paar zu vergleichen, verliert sie den Blick für die Liebe, die direkt vor ihr steht.

**Gesuchte Rollen (alle ca. 19–25 Jahre):**

**Weibliche Hauptrolle**
Junge Frau in ihrer ersten ernsthaften Beziehung. Unsicher, emotional offen, stark von äußeren Erwartungen und Vergleichen beeinflusst. Die Rolle erfordert ein sensibles Spiel innerer Konflikte und leiser emotionaler Veränderungen.

**Männliche Hauptrolle**
Ihr Freund. Bodenständig, ruhig und bemüht. Er liebt ehrlich, gerät aber zunehmend unter Druck, weil er den Erwartungen seiner Partnerin nicht gerecht werden kann. Subtiles, zurückgenommenes Spiel ist wichtig.

**Weibliche Nebenrolle**
Junge Frau mit perfekter Außenwirkung. Kontrolliert und diszipliniert, privat jedoch angespannt. Die Rolle lebt vom Kontrast zwischen äußerer Kontrolle und innerer Unsicherheit.

**Männliche Nebenrolle**
Charismatisch, dominant, stark auf Außenwirkung bedacht. Kontrollierend und schnell reizbar. Muss zwischen Charme und unterschwelliger Bedrohlichkeit wechseln können.

Schauspielerfahrung ist willkommen, aber keine Voraussetzung. Wichtig sind Verlässlichkeit, Lust auf Spielen und Interesse an einem emotionalen, beziehungszentrierten Stoff.
Bei Interesse einfach eine Nachricht schreiben, dann schicken wir weitere Infos und das Drehbuch.

items.text:
🎬 SUCHE Ü50 MANN ALS DOKTOR FÜR MUSIKVIDEO (BERLIN) 🎬
Für einen Musikvideodreh in Berlin suche ich einen aufgeschlossenen Mann Ü50, der die Rolle eines Doktors übernimmt.
📅 Datum: 25.01.2026
⏱ Dauer: ca. 4–5 Stunden
📍 Ort: Berlin
🩺 Zur Rolle / Story:
Die Storyline des Musikvideos dreht sich um eine große Schönheits-OP der Künstlerin.
Der gesuchte Mann spielt den Doktor, gemeinsam mit einer bekannten Influencerin, die die Krankenschwester verkörpert.
🎶 Projekt:
– Musikvideo
– zusätzlicher Content für TikTok & Social Media
🌈 WICHTIG:
Die Künstlerin ist trans.
Daher ist es unbedingt notwendig, dass du weltoffen, respektvoll bist und kein Problem mit queeren Menschen hast.
💸 Budget:
Leider kein Honorar möglich.
Dafür:
– Credits
– Verpflegung
– ein kreatives, positives Set
– Reichweite durch Social Media Content
👤 Voraussetzungen:
– Ü50
– offen, sympathisch, zuverlässig
– keine Schauspielerfahrung nötig
📩 Interesse?
Dann melde dich direkt hier per Nachricht
oder auf Instagram:
👉 https://www.instagram.com/echtjetztkimberly
Freue mich sehr über Nachrichten & Weiterempfehlungen 💖✨

items.text:
CASTING CALL – Male Lead (23–28) – London
Hi everyone,

I’m a London-based independent singer-songwriter currently casting the male lead for a cinematic music video for my upcoming single.

The concept is set in an intimate jazz-bar environment and centres around subtle, emotionally driven performance, strong eye contact, stillness, and understated romantic tension. No dialogue required.

Looking for:

• Male, 23–28

• Clean-cut, polished presence

• Comfortable in tailored styling

• Strong subtle on-camera presence

📍 London

🗓 One-day shoot

💷 preferred collaboration + showreel-quality footage for portfolios and refrences. Payment can be negotiated.

📣 Release supported by a professional PR agency with press & digital exposure

This is a visually driven, timeless project, perfect for actors looking for cinematic reel material.

If interested, please DM with headshots, and showreel (if you don’t have one a short video tell me your name and where you’re from)

Thanks so much,

Amber

items.text:
Hello all!
I am looking to cast two roles in an upcoming short film I have in development that is a follow on of my first independent short film, The Spectre of the Line (Releases 26th March 2026).

Role information in photos.

If interested, contact myself through my email: dectokeofficial@gmail.com

Please include headshot, a showreel (optional) and anything else you deem relevant.

The role of DETECTIVE CAIN HARDING will require a self tape audition, script for scene will be given upon inquiry.

Title: The Descent of Greed

Written and directed by Dec Toke

Filming dates: approx mid-late April 2026

Filming locations: Port Talbot, South Wales

Junior yet dedicated detective, observant, intelligent, and borderline obsessed with justice. ROLE 2: AGENT HENRY SHELDRAKE Male, Mid to early 20's (playing age 20-30). Junior yet eager agent, lived a fairly sheltered life, book smart not street smart, fidgety under stress.'

items.text:
***EDIT- DATES ON SECOND SLIDE CORRECTED***

**🌿 CASTING CALL 🌿**

“We, The Women Wild”

Casting for women in their 40s-70s.

Looking for two actresses to play supporting roles in a new fringe production being performed in London on May 18th-30th (exact dates TBC).

**Rehearsals** will be taking place in **Birmingham** from **April-May** on **weekdays**.

Bases in both **Birmingham **and **London **are required.

Because these are supporting roles, you will **not** be needed for every rehearsal and we can work around your availability.

Send headshots/Spotlight link to:
**wethewomenwild@gmail.com**

Self-tape material will be sent shortly after application is received.

**DEADLINE FOR APPLICATIONS: 23RD OF MARCH**

Please note this will be a **profit-share** production.

Any questions please feel free to ask!

ROLES ALETHIA SUPPORTING ROLE FEMALE PLAYING AGE:40s-50s AGE: 40s-50s ACCENT: BRITISH (ANY) PLEASE NOTE This role requires movement, singing. _and some light slage combat. Applieants must be comfortable with all. NEE SUPPORTING ROLE FEMALE PLAYING AGE: 60s-70s ACCEHT: BRITISH (ANY) PLEASE NOTE This role requires singing and some light lightstage_combat stage combat. Applieants must be comfortable with both."

May be an image of text that says "→ Send headshots/Spotlightlink Spotlight link to: headshots wethewomenwildl@gmail.com gmail. Self-tape material will be sent shortly after application is received DEADLINE FOR APPLICATIONS: 23RD RD OF MARCH PLEASE PLEASENOTE NOTE This will be a profit-share production"

items.summary:
***EDIT- DATES ON SECOND SLIDE CORRECTED***

**🌿 CASTING CALL 🌿**

“We, The Women Wild”

Casting for women in their 40s-70s.

Looking for two actresses to play supporting roles in a new fringe production being performed in London on May 18th-30th (exact dates TBC).

**Rehearsals** will be taking place in **Birmingham** from **April-May** on **weekdays**.

Bases in both **Birmingham **and **London **are required.

Because these are supporting roles, you will **not** be needed for every rehearsal and we can work around your availability.

Send headshots/Spotlight link to:
**wethewomenwild@gmail.com**

Self-tape material will be sent shortly after application is received.

**DEADLINE FOR APPLICATIONS: 23RD OF MARCH**

Please note this will be a **profit-share** production.

Any questions please feel free to ask!

items.text:
Witam serdecznie 🙂
Warszawa. Szukamy Pana (40+) do wzięcia udziału w krótkim, 30-sekundowym nagraniu na TikTok 🙂 Trzeba zagrać bezdomnego mężczyznę.

Czas pracy – max 30 minut

Opłata – 100 zł

Nagranie odbędzie się jutro, 1 marca, w Warszawie.

Proszę zgłaszać się pod numerem: +48 790 805 669

Najlepiej od razu przesłać zdjęcia. Miłego wieczoru!

items.text:
KRAKÓW | POSZUKUJEMY STATYSTÓW
Do filmu krótkometrażowego, realizowanego w ramach Świetlicy Filmowej, szukamy statystów. Projekt NON-PROFIT

Temat: czarna komedia

Będzie nagrywana jedna scena przy ulicy, dlatego potrzebujemy osób różnych płci i wieku (co najmniej 18 lat). W scenie będzie krótka niewymagająca interakcja z głównym bohaterem. Doświadczenie aktorskie nie jest wymagane.

Data zdjęć: 5 MARCA

Zainteresowanych proszę pisać na priv

W zgłoszeniu dołącz: Imię, nazwisko, zdjęcie

items.text:
[CASTING CALL!]
Hi all! 

Currently searching for 2 actors to be involved in a short university film project.

The synopsis being an enthusiastic real estate agent scouting a home to be put on the market. Meeting the owner he intrudes on her personal business she would rather keep in the past!

Ages between 25 - 40 

The work will be unpaid however travel and food will be accommodated!!

Filming will take place in chester on the 16th - 17th of March (with potential reshoots on the 18th)

Email is provided in the poster to get in touch! Thanks a bunch!

items.text:
Hello all, I’m in need of some voice over artists for a large project happing in March/April.  

Must be from Wales as I need Welsh accents.  Half the project is in Welsh and half in English (Welsh accent).  

Recording will be taking place at my studio in central Liverpool.  If you’re local and free for the above shoot me a message.  The project will take place over multiple sessions so quite a bit of work going if you’re interested!

EDIT:  Welsh natives only, can’t just be doing a Welsh accent im afraid.  The recording will be taking place in Liverpool April time ish over 5 days or so.  Please only get in touch if the above works for you.  Thanks!

topComments.text: Hi James, I’m an Actress from North West Wales who is fluent in the Welsh language. I have a degree in acting and have lived in Liverpool for over 6 years now, I’m highly interested in this opportunity and would love to speak more about it, thank you :)

Hi James. I’m a professional VO and I have some good contacts with experienced pro Welsh VOs but they aren’t based locally. Would you be open to a remote connection with VOs who have broadcast quality home studios and are very experienced with remote sessions? If so I’ll be happy to pass on their details.

**EXTRAS — With A Twist Casting Call (30+ needed!)**

Hi everyone! We’re looking for **30+ extras** for the short film **With A Twist**.

**Location:** The Bearded Monk, 122 E McKinney St, Denton, TX 76201

**Date:** Sunday, March 1st
 **Time:** 10pm – 6am

**Wardrobe:** Casual
* **No copyright logos**
* Please wear **gray, black, white, or brown** attire

 **Requirements:**
* **18+**
* **Unpaid role**
* **No speaking lines**
* Scene takes place **at a bar**
* **All genders & ethnicities welcome**

**Interested? items.text:
🎬 Seniorzy na TAK – kolej łączy pokolenia!
W 2026 roku obchodzimy 100-lecie polskiej kolei. To wyjątkowy jubileusz, który dedykujemy tym, którzy tę historię tworzyli – naszym seniorom.
W Muzeum Kolejnictwa w Jaworzynie Śląskiej nestorzy polskiej kolei to nie tylko świadkowie minionych dekad, ale przede wszystkim strażnicy pamięci, pasji i wartości. To oni przekazują młodszym pokoleniom wiedzę, doświadczenie i miłość do pary, stali i torów.
Bohaterem naszego filmu jest m.in. Zbigniew Gryzgot – legenda środowiska, człowiek o niespożytej energii, nazywany „kolejowym Mickiem Jaggerem”. 78 lat życia, dziesiątki lat pracy i jedna niezmienna miłość – kolej.
Bo historia kolei to historia ludzi.
A my mówimy o nich głośno i z dumą.
#PolskaNaTak  #muzeumkolejnictwa #seniorzy

items.summary:
🎬 Seniorzy na TAK – kolej łączy pokolenia!
W 2026 roku obchodzimy 100-lecie polskiej kolei. To wyjątkowy jubileusz, który dedykujemy tym, którzy tę historię tworzyli – naszym seniorom.
W Muzeum Kolejnictwa w Jaworzynie Śląskiej nestorzy polskiej kolei to nie tylko świadkowie minionych dekad, ale przede wszystkim strażnicy pamięci, pasji i wartości. To oni przekazują młodszym pokoleniom wiedzę, doświadczenie i miłość do pary, stali i torów.
Bohaterem naszego filmu jest m.in. Zbigniew Gryzgot – legenda środowiska, człowiek o niespożytej energii, nazywany „kolejowym Mickiem Jaggerem”. 78 lat życia, dziesiątki lat pracy i jedna niezmienna miłość – kolej.
Bo historia kolei to historia ludzi.
A my mówimy o nich głośno i z dumą.
#PolskaNaTak  #muzeumkolejnictwa #seniorzy
items.title: 🎬 Seniorzy na TAK – kolej łączy pokolenia!

items.text:
**Mini serial wojenny 1940 – Żołnierz Waffen SS ( szeregowy )**

**Szukamy skarbu Templariuszy z 1307 roku!**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’Morskie opowieści’’ poszukuje ** mężczyzn** **bez zarostu** w **wieku 20 – 50** lat o wzroście 170  cm, pas 85/90 i **obwód klatki do 90/95cm**  i do roli żołnierzy szeregowego Waffen SS .Szukamy kogoś z **Gliwic lub okolic**: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie. Kostium jest już zrobiony na konkretny wymiar a osoba grająca tego żołnierza będzie zmiennikiem innego o podobnych parametrach. Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. W lipcu i sierpniu tego  roku szykujemy się do kilku scen bitewnych z francuzami. Kilka postaci ma nieduże kwestie po niemiecku.

 

     **Prosimy o wysłanie aktualnych zdjęć** gdyż tylko takowe zgłoszenia będą rozpatrywane. Szukamy kogoś z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie, jest to ważny czynnik w wyborze kandydata jak również doświadczenie aktorskie ( nie koniecznie duże ). Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic.

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
URGENT Casting Call for 5 Italian Nonnas – PAID 1-Day Coffee Commercial in LA
Hi everyone! We’re urgently looking to cast five older women to play Italian nonnas in a documentary-style commercial for a franchise coffee brand.

This is a sweet, natural, conversational role — NO FORMAL ACTING EXPERIENCE NEEDED.

📍 Location: Los Angeles County
📅 Shoot Date: Thursday, March 5, 2026
⏰ Approx. 12-hour day, call time TBD
💵 Paid gig - $300+, Travel WILL be covered
🍽 Food will be provided on set

What we’re looking for:
- Women 60 years or older
- Comfortable speaking Italian, you do NOT need to be fluent
- Just able to pronounce Italian clearly and read a few short lines

If you’re interested (or know someone who would be perfect!), please email:

📩 connect@intrasithcollective.com

Including:
-A recent photo of yourself that shows you from head to toe
-Your current hometown (For travel considerations)
-A contact phone number

Please reach out ASAP if you’re interested!

Thank you so much

items.text:
Vicky Boone Casting is looking for Japanese men who can sing the song ‘Cielito Lindo’ for a World Cup Academy Sports commercial!

Project: Academy Sports + Outdoors
Agency: McGarrah Jessee
Production Company: The Bear
Project Type: Commercial
Union Status: Non-Union
Project Rate: $500/day (session), $2,300 (use)
Fitting Rate: $50/hour (if applicable)
Callback Date(s): March 4, 2026 - IN PERSON CALLBACK IN ATX
Fitting Date(s): March 23 or March 24 (TBD)
Shoot Date(s): March 26 - March 30, 2026 (will likely shoot 1-2 day within this range)
Shoot Location: Austin, TX (and surrounding area). Must work local to Austin.
Term: 6 months from first air date for All TV, Digital/Online/Social Media, and Theatrical/Industrial Usage
—

We are looking for:
[YUICHI] 30-45 year old Japanese male. Energetic and able to sing Cielito Lindo. OCP.

If you are a fit and interested in submitting, please submit ASAP to submissions@vickyboonecasting.com by sending the following info:

*Name
*City you live in
*Contact Number
*Two recent photos
*Confirm you are avail for all the dates mentioned or list conflicts (3/23-3/24 and 3/26-3/30)
*Briefly tell us about your singing experience
*Please use the subject line “YUICHI”

Use: 6 months from first air date for All TV, Digital/Online/ Social Media, and Theatrical/ Industrial Usage, per the below Territory with the exception of the cable SEC channel is broadcasted nationally.
*Usage to be paid upon First Use date if performer appears in final video edit as OCP and includes unlimited edits, lifts, and versions now known or hereafter developed including but, not limited to, social extensions.

We look forward to your submissions!

[We do not give permission to other casting sites to repost this casting call]

– Team VBC

Vicky Boone Casting is looking for Latino/Latina kids, ages 8-15 with soccer skills for principal roles in an Academy Sports commercial!

Project: Academy Sports + Outdoors
Agency: McGarrah Jessee
Production Company: The Bear
Project Type: Social Media Campaign
Union Status: Non-Union
Project Rate: $500/day
Fitting Rate: $50/hour (if applicable)
Shoot Date(s): March 26 - March 30, 2026 (will likely shoot 1-2 day within this range)

Shoot Location: Austin, TX (and surrounding area). Must work local to Austin.
Term: 3 months from first use date for video and perpetual for stills
—

We are looking for:
[SOCCER KIDS] - Male or Female, Ages 8-15, Latino/Latina. Real looks. Strong soccer skills.

If your kid might be a fit and you are interested in submitting them, please submit ASAP to submissions@vickyboonecasting.com by sending the following info:

*Child’s Name
*Age
*City you live in
*Parent’s Name
*Contact Number
*Two recent photos of your kid
*Confirm you are avail for all the dates mentioned or list conflicts (3/23-3/24 and 3/26-3/30)
*Tell us a little bit about their soccer experience
*Please use the subject line “SUMMER SOCCER KID”

Use: Video usage covers use in social media for 3 months from first air date, includes unlimited edits, lifts, and versions now known or hereafter developed. Usage also covers use of stills for use in: all digital media (including but not limited to: websites, emails, paid/organic social, banners, etc.), in-stores, collateral material, and OOH. Still usage is perpetual

We look forward to your submissions!

– Team VBC

items.text:
Extras wanted! | short film All Included
We are casting Supporting Artists / Featured Extras to play warehouse tenants in a scripted flat-viewing scene. Some roles may include light dialogue.

🎬Project: All Included (Short Film)

All Included is a London-set short film directed by an award-winning LFS graduate director, working with a dedicated professional crew. The film follows Rob as he searches for a place to live, only to find that each viewing becomes an audition disguised as conversation—quiet assessments of his habits, politics, desirability, and how easily he can fit into someone else’s rules. Minimal, dry, and quietly comic, the film explores how a contemporary city can feel reasonable on the surface while steadily shrinking space, privacy, and the right to be inconvenient. The project is being produced with festival submissions in mind.

🎭Role: Tenants in a converted warehouse building, taking part in a naturalistic flat-viewing conversation scene. There are potentially dialogue to be spoken.

Any genders/ethnicity welcomed, age 20-35

📅Date: 2nd, March, 2026

📍Location: London

⌚️Time Blocks (please indicate your availability)

BLOCK1 - 11.30-14.30

BLOCK2 - 19.00-22.00

💰Flat Rate: £20 (snacks & drinks provided)

You will receive screen credit and production stills (great for portfolio-building).

To Apply：

Please email yanyuetaozhi@gmail.com with:

- Full name + phone number

- Recent photo(s)of yourself/ any portfolio or showreel(optional)

- Availability (which time block(s))

Thank you!

items.text:
A Tale of Two Headshots.

Same person. Same photographer. Different outcome.

In one image:
 – The eyes stare rather than connect
 – The smile feels hesitant
 – The jacket draws attention away from the face

In the other:
 – The eyes engage
 – The smile reaches the eyes
 – The wardrobe supports the subject instead of dominating

The difference isn’t dramatic lighting or expensive equipment.
It’s intention.

A headshot isn’t just a picture of someone.

It’s a message about them.

And if we’re not carefully managing expression and visual weight within the frame, the message becomes confused.

The person in the photograph should always remain the focus. 

Everything else is secondary.

If you’re a photographer who wants to understand what headshots really communicate - beyond technique - I’ve created a free guide that breaks this down in detail.

You can download it here 👇

#HeadshotPhotography
 #PortraitPhotographer
 #PhotographyEducation
 #ActorHeadshots
 #StudioPhotography
 #PhotographyMentor
 #CreativePortrait
 #ProfessionalHeadshots

items.text:
Your weekly international comedy meetup in the heart of Warsaw ❣️🤍
Live comedy. Real presence. Shared space.

We host a weekly English-language comedy night where people come together to laugh, listen, and connect in the same room.

Stand-up, improv, and occasional surprises, always live, always shaped by the people who show up.

It’s not about being the biggest or loudest show in town.
It’s about creating a space where comedy feels human again.
Each night is a little different.
Some shows lean more toward stand-up, others toward improv or playful experimentation. Sometimes something unexpected sneaks in. Nothing is repeated exactly the same way twice.

You’ll see a mix of bold local and international comedians, first-timers taking their first five minutes on stage, and more experienced performers trying new material in front of a real audience.

We’re not chasing trends.
We’re simply building something consistent, welcoming, and alive.
Hosted by Miguel Ferreira
A Brazilian comedian based in Warsaw, curious about people, culture, and what happens when strangers laugh together.

Why this exists
Because people miss being in rooms.
Because shared laughter still works.
Because live moments feel different when you’re actually there.
This isn’t background entertainment.
It’s something you’re part of.
Schedule
Happy Hour & Meet & Greet: 7:00 PM
Show starts: 8:00 PM
Location
Południk Zero
Wilcza 25, Warsaw
15 minutes from Pałac Kultury

🎟 Tickets:
https://fienta.com/2-0-comedy-show2-154404

🐾 Well-behaved pets are welcome.
🎤 Thinking about performing?

Each show keeps one spot open for a first-time performer.
Five minutes. One mic. A real audience.
📍 Impact Warsaw
Instagram: @impactwarsaw, @miguelatcomedy
Events: impactwarsaw.com/events
Inner Circle: https://t.me/+xJpuxiG5Au8xMmZk
If you’re curious, you’re welcome.
If you need a break from scrolling, come sit with us.
Just show up and see what happens.

items.text:
#castingcall

Could you be our Frank Sinatra or Sammy Davis Jr.?

The Brookside Theatre is staging THAT'S LIFE - The Rat Pack musical  in April and we are on the lookout for 2 male performers for these iconic roles...

We are looking for performers who can act and sing like Frank and Sammy but they do not need to look like them ....

Also looking for 3 female singers who can deliver close harmonies as the Seraph Sisters 

Venue: Brookside Theatre Romford 

Show w/c 30th March

Rehearsals March 2026 in Romford by a schedule

Profit share production 

For info pack please PM me or email casting@brooksidetheatre.com

#casting #ratpack #FrankSinatra #SammyDavisJr #audition

items.text:
NYE STATISTROLLER TIL OPTAGELSER I JYLLAND PÅ TV-SERIEN DE BEDSTE FAMILIER (DR)

Til tv-serien De Bedste Familier (til DR) søges personer i Jylland alder 20-50 år til statistroller med optagelse i Jylland, men med kostume/sminke dag i Skovlunde på Sjælland d. 3/3, 4/3 eller 5/3 et tidsrum ml. 10-16.

Produktionen dækker transport på en af disse måder:
1. Bro og benzin fra bopæl i Jylland til Skovlunde og retur. Alternativt en lavpris færgeovergang t/r tilsvarende prisen for broafgift.
2. En lavpris bus- eller togbillet. Der kører offentlige bus fra Skovlunde st. til adressen i Mileparken.

Derudover er der et personligt honorar for kostume/sminkedagen samt et tilpasset antal optagedage. Se nedenfor

Følgende statistroller er ledige:
Funktionærer og hustruer 
Du skal kunne være med til begge optagelsesdagene
16/3 ca. 15 - 02.30 og igen 17/3 ca. kl. 11 - 22.30 i Handest Jylland

Der er til hver 1600 kr. honorar for 2 optagedage og 800 kr. honorar for 1 sminke/kostumedag.

Der er mulighed for gratis anvist parkering i Skovlunde til kostume/sminkeprøve.
Der er forplejning tilpasset tidsrum på optagelsesdage.
Udgifter til f.eks. transport dækkes ikke på optagelsesdage.

Følgende krav til krop og udseende pga. tilgængelige kostumer og tidsperioden:

NB! Danmark var ikke så beriget med forskellige nationaliteter, så du skal ligne en med dansk/nordeuropæisk herkomst.

MÆND:
max højde 185, tøjstr. S-L (der er ingen kostume i XL eller over), ingen synlige tatoveringer med skjorte på eller piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet med mindre gråt, hårlængde min. 5 cm så der kan laves sideskilning, ingen kronraget eller karseklippet, ingen skæg, du skal kunne se uden briller.

KVINDER:

max højde 175, str. XS-L, korthåret, min. hårlængde til skulder, naturlig hårfarve, ingen striber med mindre det er gråt hår, ingen synlige tatoveringer med korte ærme og kjole med udskæring på, ingen synlige piercinger, ingen synlig falske negle eller øjenvipper, ingen tatoveret eyeliner eller øjenbryn, du skal kunne have selskabssko på, du skal kunne se uden briller.

Vi skal kende følgende for at komme i betragtning, som skal sendes i en mail til ajlystbaek@hotmail.com

Navn, alder, mobilnummer, højde, tøjstr., skostr., mål: hoved-hals-bryst-talje-hofte og inseam/outseam.

Der skal være to helt nye billeder: vellignende billede i helfigur samt et selfie, hvor hår og ansigt ses tydeligt.

Oplys, hvilken mulighed du har for at komme over til kostume/sminkeprøven og forventet pris.

items.text:
**KORTFILM**

*VI SØGER EN KVINDE OG EN MAND I ALDEREN 19 TIL 25 ÅR TIL OPTAGELSER DEN 11. OG 12. APRIL 2026*

Vi kommer fra Den Danske Ungdomsfilmskole (Station Next Aarhus), hvor vi skal i gang med vores hovedproduktion. Det drejer sig om en komediekortfilm, som optages i foråret 2026.

Filmen handler om en mand, der forsøger at redde sit forhold, efter han har glemt at købe en årsdagsgave til sin kæreste.

Du bedes sende et selftape ud fra instruktionerne under den rolle, du søger. Manuskriptet sendes ved henvendelse.

Selftape behøver ikke være teknisk avanceret. En simpel optagelse på telefon er helt fint.

**Løn:**

Rollerne er ulønnede, men transport og forplejning dækkes.

**Optagelser:**

Optagedagene er planlagt som heldagsproduktioner begge dage.
Optagelserne finder sted i Aarhus og omegn.

**Roller:**

**Lukas:**

Alder 19 til 25 år
Lukas er en ynkelig mand, der ofte hopper over, hvor gærdet er lavest, men som vil gøre alt for at redde sit forhold.
I dit selftape skal du tage udgangspunkt i replik 35 samt replik 9 til 14.

**Sofie:**

Alder 19 til 25 år
Sofie er realistisk og tror på, at et forhold kræver tid og energi.
I dit selftape skal du tage udgangspunkt i replik 37 og ned til slutningen.

**Deadline:**

Deadline for selftape er 28. februar 2026.
Vi afholder fysisk casting den 7. marts 2026.

**Ansøgning:**

Ansøgningen sendes til Nikoline på
**nfischermikkelsen@gmail.com**

OM ROLLEN: skarp interesseret klog pige, der utroligt voksnes verden. Erfaring er ikke Filmen omhandler kvinde og lille pige magtkamp mellem spejderlejr. ung PRAKTISK Optagelserne derudover stede. forega Aarhus omegn uge sorge gode trygge rammer, altid ansvarlige voksen Rollen ulennet, men kost forplejning selvfolgelig vaere sorget for, samt nogle spaendende sjove optagedage. Ved interesse send gerne dig, hvor fortaeller gerne gerne billeder samt sendes video introduktion máske Derudover vedhaeft relevant erfaring. instruktorassistent Ansogning skal sendes inden 4/3 forventer kunne give pả forste castingrunde 11/3. here fra S8'

CASTING CALL: NEWBORN BABIES FOR HOSPITAL COMMERCIAL! 👶
Powerhouse Casting is on the hunt for a brand-new baby to star in an upcoming hospital commercial! We are looking for tiny superstars who can capture those precious early moments.
WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:
Age: 15+ days old to about 1.5 months old.
The Vibe: The younger, the better! We want that true "newborn" look.
IMPORTANT DATES (Must be available for all):
Wardrobe: March 23, 2026
Shoot Dates: March 24 – 25, 2026
Possible Photoshoot Return: March 26, 2026 (for select talent only)
COMPENSATION & RATES:
(Moving Media rates are inclusive of agency fees)
Session Fee: $600.00
Wardrobe Fee: $75.00
Usage (Moving Media): $5,000.00 (2-year term, includes digital stills pulled from video)
Additional Stills (if selected): $2,250.00 + 15% AF (2-year term, includes Print & OOH)
HOW TO APPLY:
Please follow this link for full application instructions:
👉 APPLY HERE - hit this LINK:  https://projectnewborn.castingcrane.com/
Know a new parent with a beautiful newborn? Please TAG them or SHARE this post to help us find our star!
#CastingCall #NewbornCasting #TorontoTalent #PowerhouseCasting #BabyModel #HospitalCommercial

items.text:
Hello to every mother out there that is in the 18-40 age range! 
Note: This is a Heery Loftus casting opportunity. Martino Casting and Red Arena Films are not associated with the company, but believe there are so many talented/courageous/fantastic momma’s in the #Philadelphia and #tristatearea that we simply had to share this casting call. 
Break ‘em!

sharedPost.text:
HEERY LOFTUS CASTING – SEEKING A REAL MOM with pre-schoolers. We’re looking for a mom  with pre-schoolers who has a "hipster" vibe- not your typical soccer mom. Wild colored hair, Piercings, tattoos ok!  

If that’s you, send us a some pictures of you with your kid(s)
Looking for Non-Union women , age 20-35
Shoot Dates: Feb 27–28 or March 1
Location: Philadelphia area
Rate: $3,600/day (This is a principal role)
Please submit photos by ASAP!  by 2/25/26 @ 4=5PM
Be sure to tell us your name, phone number, age, kids names and ages  and where you are located.

Please submit to: heeryloftuscasting@gmail.com

Please share!

items.text:
Paid Casting Call – North Park (This Monday the 2nd)
Looking for a female (ages 25–35) for a baby brand shoot this Monday the 2nd in North Park.

• Paid opportunity

• You do not need to have a baby or be pregnant

• 2–3 hour shoot

• Must be comfortable on camera and able to deliver lines naturally

If interested, please DM me or text 858-753-5927 with your past work (content creation samples or acting reels). Thanks!

items.text:
🎃 CASTING CALL – HALLOWEEN PARTY EXTRAS 🎃
MASZED – Final Year Film | Edinburgh Napier University

We are looking for supporting artists / extras to join us for the Halloween party opening scene of MASZED.

This is the first scene of the film – a stylised, energetic bar sequence where every background character has a specific action to perform in loops. You won’t just “stand around”. You will be part of a choreographed atmosphere that builds tension from the very first frame.

🎬 SHOOT DATE
3rd March 2026
📍 Edinburgh

🎭 ROLE
Halloween Party Supporting Artists / Extras
* Any gender
* 18+ (can play adult bar guests)
* Comfortable performing simple repeated actions on cue (dancing, flirting, laughing, drinking, reacting, moving through space etc.)
* Halloween costume required (we can discuss options if needed)

🎥 ABOUT THE FILM
MASZED follows Tomasz, a Polish immigrant who was bullied and racially abused as a teenager in Edinburgh.
20 years later, he finds himself working with Shelley – one of his former abusers.

The Halloween party scene takes place in Brian’s Bar and introduces the adult characters before the story unfolds.

Watch the teaser here:
[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Kn0ljtpTszw](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Kn0ljtpTszw)

🍽 UNPAID STUDENT PRODUCTION
Food and travel provided.

All filming takes place in Edinburgh.

📩 TO APPLY
Email: 40721281@live.napier.ac.uk
Instagram:[ https://www.instagram.com/maszedfilm/
](https://www.instagram.com/maszedfilm/)GoFundMe:[ https://www.gofundme.com/.../maszed-a-film-about-bullying](https://www.gofundme.com/.../maszed-a-film-about-bullying)...

If you want to be part of a visually strong opening sequence and gain on-set experience in a final year drama production – we would love to hear from you.

Let’s fill the bar. 🎃🔥

Any gender, age 18+ must be comfortable performing simpple actions ·Unpaid student production. Food and travel provided. APPLY NOW: 40721281@live.napier.ac.uk 0 @maszedfllm gufundne.cm/msasa-ilebl'

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL – No-Budget Comedy Spot (Manga-Style)**

**Arbeitstitel:** „Das Pizza-Finale“
**Drehort:** Köln
**Drehtermin:** 07.03.2026 (Samstag)
**Uhrzeit:** 14 Uhr
**Format:** Werbespot im Manga-/Anime-Stil
**Genre:** Comedy, situative Rivalität

Für einen humorvollen Werbespot suchen wir drei spielfreudige Darsteller:innen aus Köln mit starkem mimischem Ausdruck und sehr gutem Gespür für Timing.

Die Szene lebt von intensiven Blicken, inneren Monologen (V.O.) und überzeichneter „Battle“-Dramatik im Manga-Stil. Gesucht werden Persönlichkeiten, die Alltagssituationen mit epischer Ernsthaftigkeit spielen können.

**Logline:**

Ein harmloses Pizzaessen eskaliert komödiantisch zu einem stillen Wettkampf um das letzte Stück.

**🍕 JOHAN**

**Spielalter:** 20–35
**Typ:** Ehrgeiziger, leicht überambitionierter Typ mit Comedy-Talent
**Aussehen:** Blond, schlank, leicht nerdiger Look, kurze Haare, europäischer Typ. Gern Brillenträger.

**Charakter:**
Johan nimmt harmlose Situationen viel zu ernst. In seinem Kopf wird das letzte Pizzastück zum epischen Endkampf. Er ist analytisch, kompetitiv – aber auf sympathische, leicht überdrehte Weise.

**Anforderung:**
Starke Mimik (intensive Close-ups), gutes Timing für Voice-Over-Texte, körperliche Comedy (Speed-Eating, Blickduell).

**🍕 MARIO**

**Spielalter:** 30–45
**Typ:** Selbstbewusster, ruhiger Gegenspieler mit natürlicher Autorität
**Aussehen:** Kräftige oder leicht muskulöse Statur, schwarze Haare, asiatischer Typ

**Charakter:**
Mario ist der gelassene Stratege. Er sagt wenig, kommentiert aber innerlich alles im Voice-Over. Sein Humor ist trocken, sein Blick maximal ernst – zumindest in seiner eigenen Vorstellung.

**Anforderung:**
Starke Präsenz, subtile Komik, intensiver Blickkontakt. Fähigkeit, Überdramatisierung mit absoluter Ernsthaftigkeit zu spielen.

**🍕 KERSTIN**

**Spielalter:** 25–40
**Typ:** Smart, ruhig, fashion-bewusst – mit starkem Comedy-Instinkt
**Aussehen:** Schlank, eher klein, stilvoller Look, braune Haare; europäischer oder südamerikanischer Typ

**Charakter:**
Während die beiden Männer sich in ihrem inneren Endkampf verlieren, beobachtet Kerstin alles entspannt – nur um im perfekten Moment das letzte Stück zu nehmen. Sie ist die stille Siegerin.

**Anforderung:**
Natürliches Spiel, feines Timing, selbstbewusste Ausstrahlung. Der Humor entsteht aus ihrer Gelassenheit.

Einen Eindruck unserer bisherigen Arbeiten findet Ihr unter:
https://www.visuzfilms.com/

Das Projekt wird ohne Budget umgesetzt. Eine Vergütung sowie die Übernahme von Fahrt- oder Unterkunftskosten sind daher leider nicht möglich.

Wir bieten jedoch ein engagiertes Team, kreative Zusammenarbeit und hochwertiges Material für das eigene Showreel.

Für Verpflegung am Set ist selbstverständlich gesorgt – inklusive Pizza 🍕

 

**📩 Bewerbung & Kontakt**

Bitte sendet eure Bewerbung mit:
* aktuellem Foto
* Showreel (falls vorhanden)
* Instagram / facebook (falls vorhanden)

an:
**E-Mail: visuzfilms@gmail.com**
Betreff: *Casting „Das Pizza-Finale“ – Rollenname*

Wir freuen uns auf eure Bewerbungen!

sharedPost.text:
Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"

I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet.  But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there  to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men  25 to 36 years old,  good looking  who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.

items.title: Let's welcome our new members!

items.text:
Casting Call - short MA student film

Mercy 

Please message if you are interested in any of these roles or have any questions.

Filming dates: Late March/April 

Location: Middlesbrough 

Description: A devout Catholic doctor is forced to confront an unbearable moral and legal dilemma when his terminally ill mother is kept alive by machines, pushing him to the brink of faith, love and restraint. 

This film will contain themes of grief, death and illness.

We encourage people who have lived experience with these themes.

Thanks

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTING Mercy (short film) Project overview CALL A devout Catholic doctor is forced to confront an unbearable moral and legal dilemma when is terminally ill mother is kept alive by machines, pushing him to the brink of faith, love and restraint. Production details Production dates: March/April 2026 Location: Middlesbrough area Director(s): Tom Baldwin, Ajay Burra Producer: Ash Sharp Production Company: Teesside University, Filmmaking MA Contract type: unpaid, student film, catering and travel will be covered. Genre: drama Format: 15 minute short film Setting: UK hospital Tone: intimate, restrained, morally tense Themes of grief, death and illness.'
May be an image of text

items.text:
ISO: Background Performers – March 2 – VOLUNTEER

Hi everyone!

We’re looking for background performers for a short film shooting on March 2nd. You’ll be playing club attendees and bystanders in a nightclub scene.

This is a self-funded passion project, and these are volunteer roles. It’s a great opportunity to gain on-set experience, connect with other creatives, and be part of an indie production. Meals and crafty will be provided.

If you’re available and interested, please DM me with your availability and a recent photo. Feel free to share with anyone who might want to join!

Additional information: 

Director: Brandon James Gilbert

Producer(s): Javier Porragas, Jacob Crawford 

DOP: Max Brey 

This is a Union Project, but your BG work will not be applicable to Union status.

items.text:
**TITLE:** A Thirst That Kills 

**GENRE: **Dark Drama / Tragedy 

**LOGLINE:** Desperate to reclaim the woman he loves, a drowning alcoholic reaches for anything to stay afloat, only to discover some lifelines pull you under faster.  

**ROLES: **

**Keith - **18-38 / Male / Any Ethnicity - Keith is a charming, intelligent, emotionally articulate man who drinks because sobriety would force him to sit alone with himself. He’s not a stereotype drunk. He’s functional, witty, and painfully self-aware. That’s what makes him dangerous to himself. Keith doesn’t believe he’s worthless. That’s the tragedy. He believes he’s almost worth saving. If he could just get Cassie back, just get through tonight, just take the edge off, then maybe tomorrow he’ll fix everything. Tomorrow never comes.

**Cassie - **18-38 / Female / Any Ethnicity - Cassie is strong, compassionate, and exhausted. She is not cold, she’s done bleeding. Loving Keith cost her too much of herself, and she finally chose survival over hope. She still loves him. That’s what makes her boundary so painful. Cassie isn’t rejecting Keith out of cruelty or anger; she’s rejecting the cycle. Every word she speaks to him is careful, restrained, and heavy with history.

**Robert** - 18-38 / Male / Any Ethnicity - Robert is Keith’s mirror, what Keith could look like if he cleaned up just enough to function. He’s not malicious, not reckless, not stupid. He’s human. Robert wants to help Keith, but he wants to help without sacrifice. He doesn’t want confrontation, ultimatums, or responsibility. Giving Keith Percocet feels like kindness, like pragmatism. It’s easier than saying, “You need real help,” because that would force Robert to examine his own habits.

**PRODUCTION COMPANY: **A UCCS student film, directed by **Brett Nagy, **written** **by** Brett Nagy** and produced by **Tyla Stogsdill.**

**PRODUCTION TYPE: **Indie / short film.

**CONTACT INFORMATION:** athirstthatkillsfilm@gmail.com

**RUN TIME:** 10 min short.

**COMPENSATION: **Non-Paid.

**UNION STATUS:** Non-Union.

**AUDITION INFORMATION: **Saturday -** **February 28, 2026. Location: UCCS Campus - El Pomar Center 103 (directions will be sent by email)

**SHOOTING SCHEDULE:** one 12 hour shoot day held on Wednesday - March 25, 2026.

items.previewDescription: Historische Dokumentationen, Reenactment und Bildungsprojekte aus Weinheim/Mannheim/Heidelberg. Mit Schülern, Schauspielern & Zeitzeugen machen wir Geschichte lebendig – jetzt Filme ansehen & mitwirken Filmemacher aus Mannheim für historische Dokumentationen und Reenacting

sharedPost.text:
Für eine Hauptrolle in unserer historischen Dokumentation über Elisabeth Auguste (Kurfürstin, 18. Jahrhundert) suchen wir dringend einen männlichen Darsteller (ehrenamtlich).

Zur Rolle:
Gesucht wird ein Mann bis ca. 45–50 Jahre für die Rolle eines Offiziers (Kontext: Erster Koalitionskrieg) sowie Geliebter von Elisabeth Auguste. Es handelt sich um eine zentrale, wiederkehrende Figur.

Dreh & Zeitaufwand:

insgesamt ca. 7 Drehtage im Jahr 2026
erster Drehtermin: 07. März 2026 in Bensheim
weitere Drehs voraussichtlich in Mannheim, Weinheim und Heidelberg
Wichtig: Die Mitwirkung ist ehrenamtlich (unbezahlt).

Wenn du Interesse hast oder jemanden kennst, der passen könnte, freuen wir uns über eine kurze Nachricht (gern mit Foto/kurzer Vorstellung und ggf. Schauspielerfahrung).

Hi guys! 

I’m urgently casting for a new TV series shooting in London from the end of May. 

I need a young white male 18 - 24. Needs to be funny, wild and a rule breaker. 

Also looking for another male role 18 - 21 for another role in the same show. 

Please comment below and I will send more info in DMs. I can’t post any more details on here due to NDA’s but can give more info on a call. Get in touch ASAP please!

items.text:
**NOW CASTING!! **

“Let’s Talk Medicare” Educational Video Series
Production Company: Playfish Media
Client: UCLA Health Medicare Advantage Plan (UHMAP)
Role: On Camera Host / Medicare Advocate
Union Status: Non-union
Shoot Duration: One full day
Shoot Dates: April 1, 2, or 3 (exact date TBD)
Filming Location: Seattle, WA
Usage Term: 3 years, regional to Los Angeles County

Project Overview:
“Let’s Talk Medicare” is a five-part educational video series designed to provide clear, accessible guidance on important Medicare topics. Each video runs ~2 minutes and will also be cut into :30 and :15 versions for digital platforms. The host speaks directly to camera, simplifying complex information and building trust with viewers.

Travel:
Local talent in Seattle is encouraged, but nationwide casting is open. Travel and accommodations will be provided if needed.

Disclosure Requirement:
Talent must disclose any previous representation, endorsement, or appearance in advertising for Medicare-related brands (including Kaiser, UnitedHealthcare, or SCAN).

Rate:
$1,000 shoot day
$3,500 usage + Agency fees (is applicable) 

Submission Instructions:
Please submit a self-taped audition using the provided script sample, along with headshot and resume:

Email: talent@playfishmedia.com
Submission Deadline: March 3rd EOD

Script Sample:
“Hi there! If you’re new to Medicare, UCLA Health Medicare Advantage Plan is here to help you get started. It’s important to understand Medicare eligibility requirements. Most people become eligible for Medicare when they turn 65. People under 65, with a qualifying disability, may also be eligible.”

topComments.text: Thanks for sharing this opportunity! What gender and age range are you looking for?
Are you serious? Non-union!! I would have expected more from UCLA.

items.title: **NOW CASTING!! **

items.text:
Vicky Boone Casting is looking for Latino men ages 30-50 for a World Cup Academy Sports commercial!

We are looking for:

[SOCCER FAN] Male, 30-50, Latino. Real looks/Dad vibes. Mustache is a plus, but not required. OCP.

Project: Academy Sports + Outdoors
Agency: McGarrah Jessee
Production Company: The Bear
Project Type: Social Media Campaign
Union Status: Non-Union
Project Rate: $500/day
Fitting Rate: $50/hour (if applicable)
Fitting Date(s): March 23 or March 24 (TBD)
Shoot Date(s): March 26 - March 30, 2026 (will likely shoot 1-2 day within this range)
Shoot Location: Austin, TX (and surrounding area). Must work local to Austin.
Term: 3 months from first use date for video and perpetual for stills
—

If you are a fit and interested in submitting, please submit ASAP to submissions@vickyboonecasting.com by sending the following info:

*Name
*City you live in
*Contact Number
*Two recent photos
*Confirm you are avail for all the dates mentioned or list conflicts (3/23-3/24 and 3/26-3/30)
*Please use the subject line “SOCCER FAN”

Use: Video usage covers use in social media for 3 months from first air date, includes unlimited edits, lifts, and versions now known or hereafter developed. Usage also covers use of stills for use in: all digital media (including but not limited to: websites, emails, paid/organic social, banners, etc.), in-stores, collateral material, and OOH. Still usage is perpetual

We look forward to your submissions!

[We do not give permission to other casting sites to repost this casting call]

– Team VBC

CASTING CALL / PAID / Non-Union

Looking for one mixed ethnicity couple for a one-day lifestyle video and photo shoot in Coquitlam. Individual applicants are welcome though preference will be given to couples. No speaking roles.

Desired Attributes:

  • Non-union

  • Young couple

  • Active lifestyle

  • Available March 20 (subject to change) in Coquitlam area

Usage:

  • Real estate advertisement in Canada

  • Primarily website and social media advertising

  • Perpetual (but most likely 1-3 years of actual use)

Budget:

  • $700 / person / day (up to 8 hours)

Apply @ go.opencast.ca/casting/SBI by Mar 9, 2026

Questions? info@opencast.ca

items.text:
Last Minute Casting Call!

A Capilano University student film production is in need of two young female actors who are willing to smoke herbal cigarettes.

Callbacks would take place on March 2nd in North Vancouver, and a self-tape would be required before callbacks.

Shooting dates are March 13th, 14th and 15th.

 

Please email christinahodges@my.capilanou.ca for sides and if more details are required.

items.text:
# CASTING CALL FOR A SFU student film

non-union. unpaid.

**Project Synopsis**

The film is eerie and has supernatural elements. ALEX experiences visions of an eerie field with a nearing FIGURE while going about their day. We follow as this other world steep into theirs. 

~ ACTING EXPERIENCE IS NOT REQUIRED.

The two characters only share ~2 scenes together.

ALEX: (18-25yo) A little neurotic. An overthinker. The visions are affecting the quality of life as they keep losing time. Lives alone and works contract financial jobs from home. Very little dialogue. There is one scene where ALEX changes from work clothes to pajamas. Discussion will happen before set and everything will be adjusted to your comfort level!

FIGURE: (ageless) must be comfortable wearing some type of mask or face covering. A pivotal point in the story. We will never see a face clearly. Non-speaking but a sinister presence. 

SHOOT DAY: March 7th and 8th

7th: outside (with easy access to house), later night. Langley. If there is any concerns regarding transportation we can arrange help for you!

8th: Burnaby area, day.

Please email your headshot, availability to have meeting & demo reel (if you have one) to mgjohnson.film@gmail.com

Hey zusammen, 

Ich suche für eine kleine YouTube Serie eine Darstellerin die eine Influencerin spielt. Das Team ist klein also eigentlich nur ich 😂. Bei Interesse gerne melden und weitere Infos bekommst du dann per privater Nachricht. 

Spielalter ca. 20-23 Jahre. Solltest du älter sein aber "jünger" aussehen sollte das kein Problem sein. 

Gage stand jetzt Keine ( sorry) 

Das gesamte materiale kannst du gerne benutzen. Für Verpflegung ist gesorgt.

Drehstart ca. Mai/Juni

Viele Grüsse 
Daniel
